periods.name: Tonight
periods.shortForecast: Partly Cloudy then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 1am. Partly cloudy. Low around 44, with temperatures rising to around 58 overnight. West wind 12 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 31 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

periods.name: Friday
periods.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 10am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 10am and 2pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 54. North wind around 17 mph, with gusts as high as 29 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%.

periods.name: Friday Night
periods.detailedForecast: Patchy frost after 5am. Mostly clear. Low around 32, with temperatures rising to around 34 overnight. North wind 7 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph.
